chartizate-text-writer-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch from source/target to release flag for Java 11 compilation.
chartizate-text-writer-api/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard for Java 9+ to ensure API compatibility; source/target 1.7 is incompatible with JDK 11 toolchain expectations for modern builds.
